creator: kseniia.journey-london-rexby
caption:
The Guardsman Hotel & Residence, located just steps away from Buckingham Palace 🇬🇧

Beautifully designed rooms and completely self-contained apartments with a private kitchen and dining area 🏡, along with exceptional service and attention to detail ✨

🫖🍰 You can also enjoy afternoon tea with delicious treats, homemade from start to finish, complete with sandwiches, warm-from-the-oven scones, and plenty of sweet delights (perfect for the upcoming Mother’s Day🌸 or to celebrate another special occasion)

📍The Guardsman Hotel & Residence @theguardsmanhotel
